name: Original Chex Party Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small microwave-safe bowl, melt butter on HIGH. Add seasoned salt and Worcestershire sauce; mix well.
2. Pour cereals, nuts, and pretzels into a large resealable plastic bag. Pour the butter mixture over the cereal mixture. Seal the top of the bag and shake until pieces are evenly coated.
3. Pour contents of the bag into a large microwave-safe bowl. Microwave on HIGH for 5 to 6 minutes, stirring every two minutes. Spread on absorbent paper to cool. Store in an airtight container.
